evidence_summary: Docs-only readiness audit passed required diff hygiene, lineage, ADR/self-hosting guardrail, seed-evidence, conformance-absence, manual overclaim, and thesis conformance gate checks.

roadmap_closeout.semantic_update_required_reason: Operator requested the roadmap to use the TDD skill for each implementation. That changes future implementation coordination and verification meaning by requiring TDD skill / red-green-refactor discipline for implementation rounds, so closeout needs a semantic roadmap revision rather than status-only selectors.
